Beverly-Hills.description:
## Compatible with the new client update, this apworld adds:
- Beverly Hills gaps, buyables, missions, etc. including a new bus access item that lets you take the bus to areas early upon receiving it.
- New goal (Get to the Skate Ranch)
- "Tricks 4 Cash", an optional system where you can get paid money for high-scoring successful tricks, toggleable in the yaml.

This APworld also has several fixes that should speedup generation and fix how it handles filler items so it doesn't make more items than it has locations. I would consider it much more stable and it plays much better with other worlds so to speak.

Make sure you also grab the newly updated V0.0.2 client, as its required to use the new features.
Beverly-Hills.title: THAW APworld V0.0.2 (Beverly Hills Update)

Latest.description: The APworld only contains Hollywood regions and locations at the moment, but it should be simple enough to scale towards the full game or close to it. I'm still slowly working on the client atm (I'm new to coding as a whole), but I'm hopeful and committed to delivering on the project's premise.
Latest.title: THAW APworld V0.0.1 (Hollywood Only)
